title: pelargonium lanceifolium
intro: Pelargonium lanceifolium, also known as the "Lance-leaf Geranium", is a species of flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family, native to South Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which are due to the presence of compounds such as geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium lanceifolium include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and flatulence, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and skin conditions.
